calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2026 Continued To Sep-30-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Gino Wilkins Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Casey Kaufman, Esq. 510-900-6399 Kaufman Law for Plaintiff.
David Belcher, Esq. 310-203-4080 FAegre Drinker Biddle & Reath for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.

The Court comments; no question these are 3 different motions; prejudice with only 1 fee, admonishes counsel, unstacked motions important to case management of docket, if lots of discovery motions discuss a discovery referee, be more strategic in motions, won't get precision, sanctions mandatory, no substantial justification, discovery abuse, completely legitimate discovery requests, judge's ruling different from a commissioner or JPT, issues could have been avoidable, meet & confer - reasonable and good faith effort to resolve issues amongst yourselves; substantial fairness with limited resources.

Mr. Belcher contests and presents arguments; apologizes to the court, raises 2 issues, had concussions, issue re sanctions, parties' extensive meet and confer.

Mr. Kaufman responds to Mr. Belcher's arguments, separated into 4 categories, prior medical disclosure, establish baseline, reconsider position, serious permanent injuries, past & future wage loss, everything else.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant Cruise LLC's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Gino Wilkins' Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
